Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria S.

Y-Not-Flooring did an amazing job installing new hardwood floors in my living room. The team was professional, efficient, and the floors look absolutely beautiful. I highly recommend them!

D
David K.

I hired Y-Not-Flooring to install laminate flooring in my basement. They were quick and the price was fair. There was a small issue with a warped plank, but they came back and fixed it promptly. Good service.

J
Jessica L.

The team at Y-Not-Flooring transformed my outdated bathroom with new vinyl flooring. The installation was seamless, and the floor is completely waterproof. I couldn't be happier with the results!

M
Michael B.

My hardwood floors were badly scratched and worn. Y-Not-Flooring's repair and restoration service brought them back to life! They look like new again. I was impressed with their attention to detail.

Additional Flooring Contractor Services

Hardwood Flooring Installation Laminate Flooring Installation Vinyl Flooring Installation Tile Flooring Installation

Y-Not-Flooring — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every flooring contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Y-Not-Flooring Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific flooring contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving New York & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout New York, NY and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

New York Yonkers White Plains Mount Vernon New Rochelle Bronx Staten Island Mamaroneck
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our flooring contractor services.

How long does hardwood installation take?

The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project, but typically it takes 2-5 days.

What types of hardwood do you offer?

We offer a wide variety of hardwoods, including oak, maple, cherry, walnut, and exotic species.

Do you offer refinishing services?

Yes, we provide hardwood refinishing services to restore the beauty of your existing floors.

Built on New York Values

Transform your space with floors that stand the test of time. Contact us today!

Let's Begin →
